title: Austin pack/goodbye list — leaving Oregon Sept 2025, food pantry intel
html:
Austin pack/goodbye list — leaving Oregon Sept 2025, food pantry intel

Source: 2025-08-21 Apple Note. Final-week Austin-move logistics: gym shortlist, goodbye list, Walmart shopping run, food-pantry research. The matched bookend to the May 2025 planning doc.

TL;DR

  • Apartment ✅, Job for Minecraft tools ✅, Gym ⚠️ — three-status check before departure.
  • Gym options: Lift ATX ($50/mo, $25 to start) vs Iron Forge Gym TX ($55/mo, has sauna).
  • Acceptance: "I am also accepting the reality that my mom will have limited time in Austin" — she's helping with the move but has to return.
  • Goodbye list: Ann + Wayne, Tío Edgar, Las Dobles As, Grandpa Eddie + Karen, Kai, GSmitty, Vicente Palencia.
  • Food-pantry intel for Austin: Micah 6 Food Pantry (West Campus, walkable), Hope Food Pantry (Central) — pre-arrival hardship planning.
  • Walmart/Ross run-list (apartment basics): scissors, knives, body wash, dish sponge, curtain rod, bathroom trash, plunger, full body mirror, hangers, batteries, silicon ice trays.
  • "Mouth tape, lifting straps, cheap glasses" — fitness/sleep gear for the new chapter.
  • Departure window: "Leave at 10-11pm... accept and account for the fact that we will have to leave later monday or even tuesday."

Pattern observed

The Austin-move trilogy: May = strategic plan, this note (Aug 21) = final logistics, Sept 20 = arrival reflection. Same three-act structure as the China chapter (decision → logistics → arrival).

The food-pantry intel reveals the financial reality the arrival note confirms: "the financial margin of error is immensely thin. We have about 1 month of savings." Yahir was planning for hardship before he left.

Open questions

  • "Job for Minecraft tools" — what is this? Sounds like a development gig.
  • The gym selection — which one was chosen? (Probably one — but doesn't say in this note.)
  • Yahir mentions he won't see Tío Edgar before he leaves — Tío Edgar is the same person from the Bubbas note who's moving to Mexico.
